## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened (include crash logs if available).

## 📱 Device Info
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Device Model | e.g. Pixel 7 |
| Android Version | e.g. Android 14 |
| MeshLink Version / Commit | e.g. `abc1234` |

## 📷 Screenshots / Logs
Attach screenshots or paste logcat output here.

paste crash log here
